$comment: Cursor MCP server configuration for Lingo.
Save this as .cursor/mcp.json in your project root,
or merge the 'mcpServers' key into your existing .cursor/mcp.json.
Alternative: Use Cursor Settings > MCP Servers > Add Server.
LINGO_GLOSSARY_PATH  Path to glossary JSON file (default: .lingo/glossary.json)
